roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, central APIs, D1 authority and instant GitHub update checks
roles.edge: all web pages, reseller bots, customer miniapps and reseller management
roles.processor: scheduled reseller automation, retry queue and background jobs; Telegram webhooks are processed directly by Edge

fixes: use the real public Core origin instead of bluepanel-edge.internal for representative management links
validate representative panel login Origin against the forwarded public origin in Service Binding mode
open central management magic links directly without a fragile redirect and consume the ticket only after the panel loads
prefer the live Telegram webhook origin over a stale app_url when generating central management links
check GitHub in the background on live requests with a five-second distributed throttle instead of waiting for a long Cron interval
release channel announcement contains only version 2.9.6 changes
